settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.upgrade_message: Upgrade to unlock unlimited playlists and early access.
settings.delete_confirm_message: Once you delete your account, all your data will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
settings.delete_modal_message: Are you sure you want to delete your account? All your playlists, tracks, and personal data will be permanently removed.
settings.upgrade_placeholder: Upgrade page will be available in Phase 2.

playlists.title: 🎵 Your Playlists
playlists.empty_desc: Create your first playlist and start organizing your music.
playlists.login_required: Please login to view your playlists.
playlists.limit_reached: You have reached the maximum of {limit} playlists for your plan.
playlists.limit_message: You have reached the maximum number of playlists for your subscription plan. Upgrade to Silver or Gold to create more.
playlists.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this playlist?

artist_dashboard.title: 🎤 Artist Dashboard
artist_dashboard.cover_image_hint: Enter a URL or leave empty for default.
artist_dashboard.album_title_required: Album title is required when releasing an album.
artist_dashboard.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this track?
artist_dashboard.no_tracks_desc: Start sharing your music with the world.
artist_dashboard.login_required: Please login to access the artist dashboard.
artist_dashboard.access_denied: You don't have permission to access this page.
